caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The person on the left, wearing a white shirt and dark pants, is gesturing with their hands while speaking. The individual in the center, dressed in a black t-shirt and black pants, listens attentively with their hands clasped together. The person on the right, in a gray suit and tie, also gestures as they contribute to the conversation. The background includes purple lighting effects and a large screen, suggesting a formal or professional setting, possibly a panel discussion or interview. A transparent table with a circuit board design is visible in front of them, adding a technological element to the scene. The audience is partially visible in the foreground, indicating that this is a public event.
